verses.translation: The Atharva Veda is the fourth Veda, dealing with everyday life, healing, spells, and practical knowledge.
It contains knowledge of medicine, rituals for peace and prosperity, and philosophical hymns.
Atharva Veda is known as the Veda of magical formulas and everyday procedures of life.
It consists of 20 kandas (books) and over 6000 suktas (hymns).
It provides insight into the daily lives, beliefs, and practices of the ancient Vedic people.
Key themes include healing diseases, ensuring long life, and protecting against enemies.
